name: Olive Garden Toscana Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 medium potatoes, halved, then quarter-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Place sausage links onto a sheet pan and bake for 25 minutes, or until done. Cut into half lengthwise, then cut at an angle into 1/2 inch slices.
3. Add onions and bacon (from the sausage) to a large saucepan and cook over medium heat until onions are almost clear.
4. Add garlic and cook an additional 1 minute.
5. Add chicken base, water, and potatoes; simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Add sausage, kale, and cream; simmer for 4 more minutes.
7. Serve. Per one cup serving: 265 calories, 17 gm carbohydrate, 10 gm protein, 18 gm fat, 897 mg sodium, 51 mg cholesterol, and 100 mg calcium.
